'''Maritan Kas''' was a [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]], and member of the [[Kiffu Guardians]], who flew [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] to [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] during his [[Anzat (species)|Anzati]]-related investigation there.
